title: Pattern
description: Schema for Pattern entities representing individual construction patterns that encode repeatable building solutions within a pattern family.

id.description: Unique identifier for the pattern, following the DNA-CONSTR-PAT naming convention.

name.description: Human-readable name of the construction pattern.

description.description: Comprehensive description of the pattern including its context, problem it solves, and the solution it provides.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON schema definition used to validate the entity.

pattern_language_version.description: Version of the Construction Pattern Language specification this entity conforms to.

entity_revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision number for this entity, incremented on each update.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was originally created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was last modified.

family_id.description: Reference to the parent PatternFamily entity that this pattern belongs to.

variants.description: Ordered list of variant identifiers representing concrete implementations or variations of this pattern.

items.description: Reference to a PatternVariant entity ID.

detail_intents.description: Optional list of specific design intents or performance goals addressed by this pattern.

artifact_intent_refs.description: Optional references to ArtifactIntent entities that describe documentation outputs for this pattern.

items.description: Reference to an ArtifactIntent entity ID.

constraint_profile_refs.description: Optional references to ConstraintProfile entities that define constraints governing this pattern.

items.description: Reference to a ConstraintProfile entity ID.
